summary: Iteration 116: Complete testing of Cost Control features - Smart Article Matching, PMP Calculation, Per-Row Allocation, and Margin Analysis. All 13 backend pytest tests passed (100%). Frontend UI fully verified: CostControlPage renders with two tabs (Processa/Analisi Margini), invoice list shows pending invoices with line count badge, smart matching displays results under line descriptions, per-row allocation table allows destination selection (Magazzino/Commessa/Generale), and Process button submits allocations successfully. Margins tab shows bar comparison (preventivo vs reale) with color-coded alerts.

calc_pmp.result: PASS - Formula (old_qty * old_pmp + new_qty * new_price) / (old_qty + new_qty) works correctly

match_article.test: Find articles by code and description
match_article.result: PASS - Matches by code regex or description substring

update_article_inventory.result: PASS - Correctly updates stock and weighted average price

create_article_from_line.test: Create new article from invoice line
create_article_from_line.result: PASS - Creates article with initial stock and price

match_articles.result: PASS - Returns smart matching results for each line with suggested_action

assign_rows.details: Magazzino: updates/creates articles with PMP; Commessa: updates costi_reali; Generale: saves as cost entry

margin_analysis.result: PASS - Returns commesse with valore_preventivo, totale_costi, margine, alert levels (verde/giallo/rosso)

commesse_search.result: PASS - Returns commesse list for dropdown selection

process_flow.empty_state_message: Tutte le fatture sono state processate

test_credentials: Created test users/sessions for testing - all cleaned up after tests
seed_data_creation: Created test articoli, commesse, fatture_ricevute - all cleaned up
context_for_next_testing_agent: Cost Control module (iteration 116) fully functional. Key features: (1) invoice_line_processor.py service handles smart matching via match_article, PMP calculation via calc_pmp, inventory updates via update_article_inventory, new article creation via create_article_from_line; (2) cost_control.py router provides endpoints for pending invoices, smart matching, per-row allocation, and margin analysis; (3) CostControlPage.js has ProcessTab (invoice list, line allocation table with destination selects) and MarginsTab (bar comparison charts with color-coded alerts); (4) Route is /controllo-costi; (5) Margin alerts: verde >20%, giallo 10-20%, rosso <10%.
